title: Update README with Author Information
description: Add the author's name and relevant details to the README file to provide clear project ownership and contact information.
details: Open the project's README.md file. Add an 'Author' section near the top or bottom, following common open source conventions. Include the author's full name, and optionally, contact email or GitHub profile link. Ensure the formatting matches the rest of the README (e.g., use Markdown headers and bullet points as appropriate).
test_strategy: Visually inspect the README.md file to confirm the 'Author' section is present, correctly formatted, and contains accurate information. Optionally, preview the file in a Markdown viewer to ensure proper rendering.
